evaluation_metadata.jd: Senior ML Engineer – Generative AI Platform

label_schema.1.0: Good Match — strong on required skills, experience, and seniority
label_schema.0.5: Partial Match — some requirements met, notable gaps exist
label_schema.0.0: Poor Match — significant mismatch on core requirements

candidates.reasoning: 7yr XP, production LangGraph multi-agent system, RAG, LLM eval, fintech domain, mentoring — nearly perfect fit
Strong GenAI skills, production RAG at scale, good eval experience. Missing regulated industry and multi-agent ownership.
Right technology stack but only 2.5yr XP, mostly assisting senior engineers. JD requires 5+ years of ownership.
Strong regulated industry background (banking) and MLOps. But GenAI experience is only POC-level. Missing LangGraph, vector DBs, LLM eval in production.
Strong backend engineer but zero ML/AI building experience. Only consumed ML APIs, never built. No RAG, LLMs, or agents.
Looks like ML experience on surface but all claims are vague with no evidence. No quantified impact, no production systems. High exaggeration signal.
Exceptional depth in RAG, LLM eval, fine-tuning, LangGraph. Published research. Production deployment. Slight mismatch: research-heavy background, may be overqualified.
Marketing analytics background. No ML engineering, no LLMs, no Python beyond pandas. Clear domain mismatch.
